sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 7

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 7:1
items.html:
(to the question) Eshet Chayil Ateret Ba'alah ["a woman of valor is the crown of her husband"]
The Gevurot [judgments] that are in the discernment of the Mochin of Gadlut [greatness] are more praised than the Hasadim [mercies], and this is the secret of "a woman of valor is the crown of her husband." (p. 761, Item 42)
